Name: Fix affiliate repo blockers and get lint/build green
Description: Resolve the current affiliate lint and build failures so the repo is green again. This includes the prop mismatch and ShareTab lint issue.

Name: Remove leftover explanatory copy from affiliate My Links
Description: Simplify the My Links experience so it reads like a clean promote-this-links page instead of a system explainer.

Name: Harden admin mutation authorization
Description: Review admin actions that use elevated access and enforce direct server-side authorization inside the action body rather than relying only on layout-level gating.

Name: QA affiliate portal mobile and desktop flow
Description: Verify tabs, copy density, link copying, and earnings flow work cleanly across breakpoints after the simplification pass.

Name: Verify seeded April daily audio month linkage
Description: Audit the seeded April daily audios and confirm month_year, publish state, and date alignment are correct.

Name: Fix /today daily-audio archive query behavior
Description: Make sure /today shows the expected prior daily audios for the active month and excludes only today's audio intentionally.

Name: Run launch-readiness content audit
Description: Use the existing launch audit tooling to find missing daily, weekly, monthly, and audio-source coverage blockers inside the launch window.

Name: Redesign /today daily-audio archive navigation
Description: Replace the raw long-list pattern with a calmer navigation model such as recent-first, expandable sections, or week grouping.

Name: Unify /today and archive-month component behavior
Description: Bring current-month and closed-month pages into one coherent model using shared visual and structural patterns where possible.

Name: Convert monthly archive page to finalized closed-month experience
Description: Treat archive month pages as completed month packages with theme, weekly reflections, and daily audios aligned to the Today design system.

Name: Hide active month from Library while it is still live on /today
Description: Update library month visibility so the active month does not appear in the archive while it is still in progress.

Name: Hide future seeded months from Library
Description: Prevent future archived months from appearing to members before they are actually reached.

Name: QA admin content publishing workflow
Description: Verify admins can create, edit, publish, and surface monthly themes, weekly principles, daily audios, and Vimeo-backed media reliably.

Name: QA /today, archive, and library month lifecycle
Description: Verify the full month lifecycle model: active month on /today, closed months in library, no future months visible.

Name: Verify account billing, cancel, and upgrade flows end to end
Description: Run the real member self-service flows and confirm billing portal, upgrade, and cancel behavior match the current product promise.

Name: Verify member contact and security settings flow
Description: Confirm members can update contact details, password, and related account settings without friction.

Name: Define downgrade handling policy and UX
Description: Decide whether downgrade is portal-driven, support-driven, or handled with a custom in-app path before building or promising it.

Name: Create public affiliate program rules page
Description: Publish the public rules page that affiliates can review before enrollment and while participating in the program.

Name: Complete affiliate agreement gating flow
Description: Require agreement to the affiliate rules before affiliate account creation or activation is completed.

Name: Decide whether affiliate agreement acceptance needs durable storage
Description: Choose whether affiliate agreement acceptance should be stored with timestamp and versioning for auditability before locking the onboarding model.

Name: Enforce affiliate payout-setup gate
Description: Require payout readiness before the affiliate portal is fully unlocked and earnings can be treated as payable.

Name: Improve Share Kit resources and interface
Description: Add stronger starter scripts, better channel-specific assets, cleaner UI, and simpler copy-to-share actions.

Name: Finalize affiliate tracking truth model
Description: Make FirstPromoter the only affiliate reporting truth and avoid showing local redirect counts as performance metrics.

Name: Audit ActiveCampaign sync behavior
Description: Verify new customer, tier-change, affiliate, cancellation, and payment-state sync events are working as intended.

Name: Verify affiliate tagging and welcome automation trigger
Description: Confirm affiliate-specific tagging and welcome automation behavior in ActiveCampaign are actually wired correctly.

Name: Define launch email system of record
Description: Decide exactly which sequences stay app-managed in Positives and which sequences belong in ActiveCampaign.

Name: Define minimum required launch sequences
Description: Reduce the lifecycle-email scope to the minimum needed for launch so the team does not overbuild the sequence map.

Name: Verify Stripe webhook lifecycle behavior
Description: Confirm checkout, subscription changes, payment failures, recoveries, cancellations, and member-state updates are all reflected correctly after webhook events.

Name: Verify cron jobs and email timing
Description: Confirm onboarding, winback, and payment-recovery cron routes are scheduled correctly and run with the intended timing.

Name: Verify unsubscribe and support/contact flows
Description: Check unsubscribe behavior, support forms, and visible support contact paths so members and leads can get clean lifecycle and help experiences.

Name: QA new-member onboarding lifecycle
Description: Verify checkout, member creation, email enrollment, and early lifecycle communication behave correctly from first purchase onward.

Name: Run Level 1 promise audit
Description: Verify the live Level 1 experience fully matches the current sales promise across content, account, and member access.

Name: Run Level 2 promise audit
Description: Verify the Level 2 sales promise against the real product and document exactly what is missing.

Name: Run Level 3 promise audit
Description: Verify the Level 3 coaching promise against the real product and close any gaps in access, replay, and delivery.

Name: Decide Level 2 product model: events only, community plus events, or combined surface
Description: Choose the clean Level 2 product shape before building the dedicated route and UX.

Name: Build Level 2 /events route and gating
Description: Create the missing member-facing events route with proper subscription gating and a clear member experience.

Name: Define Level 2 replay and archive behavior
Description: Decide how members should access past events, replays, and archives so the route has a complete model.

Name: Finish Level 3 weekly coaching Zoom flow
Description: Validate join-link handling, timing, member access, and operator workflow for weekly coaching sessions.

Name: Verify Level 3 replay publishing flow
Description: Confirm coaching replays publish cleanly and appear correctly for the right members after live sessions.

Name: Decide Level 4 surface area
Description: Confirm whether Executive Coaching remains intentionally admin-assigned only or gains more explicit product surfaces.

Name: Run full promise-vs-platform audit across pricing, join, FAQ, and upgrade
Description: Check every major promise surface against the actual implemented routes and behaviors so launch copy stays truthful.

Name: Finish marketing page mobile polish
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Fix layout, spacing, overflow, and usability issues on the public marketing page for smaller screens.

Name: Tighten homepage and join-page truth alignment

Description: Update public copy so pricing, guarantees, tiers, and promises match the actual product behavior.

Name: Re-audit FAQ, support, and legal pages

Description: Make sure supporting public pages stay aligned with the current offer, billing logic, and member experience.

Name: Finish SEO primitives

Name: Verify GA4 and affiliate attribution events
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Confirm the key public-site events, referral capture, and campaign attribution behaviors are being recorded as expected.

Name: Add smoke coverage for high-drift launch routes
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Expand targeted smoke coverage for affiliate onboarding, pricing, billing, legal, and support surfaces after the core flows stabilize.

Name: Trim public third-party script weight
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Review analytics and affiliate scripts on public routes and reduce avoidable script weight where practical.

Name: Choose minimal production monitoring approach
Description: Decide the smallest acceptable monitoring and incident-review setup for launch so issues are surfaced quickly after release.

Name: Create primary sales page control spec
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Document the default paid-offer sales-page structure and keep it as the control version of the funnel.

Name: Create VSL sales page spec
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Define the Dr. Paul-led video sales-page structure, copy flow, and CTA path before implementation.

Name: Build VSL sales page
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Implement the trust-heavy VSL page as a direct-to-paid conversion path.

Name: Define 7-day trial funnel rules
Description: Decide the exact trial offer, positioning, billing terms, and where trial traffic should be sent before implementation.

Name: Create 7-day trial funnel spec
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Document the targeted trial-page funnel, lifecycle touchpoints, and attribution requirements before coding it.

Name: Implement 7-day trial checkout and lifecycle
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Add the actual Stripe trial logic, onboarding, reminders, cancellation truth, and trial-to-paid handling.

Name: Create partner or webinar landing-page template spec
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Define the reusable template for partner, webinar, podcast, and affiliate-specific landing pages.

Name: Build partner or webinar landing-page template
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Implement a reusable page pattern for co-branded or campaign-specific traffic.

Name: Define front-end offer-routing rules
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Create the rule set for when traffic should go to the paid page, VSL page, trial page, or partner page.

Name: QA all funnel pages on mobile and desktop
Section/Column: Phase 4 — Marketing + Funnel Variants + Launch Polish
Description: Verify the control page, VSL page, trial page, and partner page all work cleanly across devices.

Name: Design public non-member partner path
Description: Define how non-member affiliates or partners should join and operate without forcing a membership purchase.

Name: Define partner/member identity linking model
Description: Document how partner records, member records, and FirstPromoter promoters should reconcile when the same email or person spans both systems.

Name: Create affiliate success guide
Description: Build a lightweight success guide that teaches affiliates how to share effectively without mixing enablement into the legal rules page.

Name: Decide blog strategy
Description: Make an explicit future decision on whether Positives should remain a marketing site or add a real blog.

Name: If approved later, define blog CMS and publishing workflow
Description: Only after launch-critical work is stable, choose the right publishing model and editorial workflow for a blog.

Name: Capture future landing-page variants backlog
Description: Hold challenge funnels, extra offers, and variant-page ideas here so they do not interrupt finish-mode work.
